articles.title: Kraken’s Layer-2 Blockchain Ink Goes Live on Mainnet Ahead of Schedule
articles.description: Coinspeaker Kraken Debuts Layer-2 Blockchain Ink on Mainnet Ahead of Schedule Built using Optimism’s OP Stack, Ink places Kraken at the cutting edge of modular blockchain technology, enabling users to access customizable and efficient DeFi solutions. Kraken Debuts Layer-2 Blockchain Ink on Mainnet Ahead of Schedule

articles.title: Cardano Whales Capitalize on ADA Price Dip to Scoop Up $160 Million in Tokens
articles.description: Whales on the Cardano ecosystem took advantage of the recent cryptocurrency market dip to keep accumulating, after realizing some of their gains when the price surpassed the $1.15 mark earlier this month. According to data shared by popular cryptocurrency analyst Ali Martinez, when Cardano traded between $1.15 and $1.33, Cardano whales sold their tokens to […]

articles.title: Coinbase takes aim at Justin Sun in WBTC lawsuit response
articles.description: Coinbase has taken aim at Justin Sun in its response to BiT Global's lawsuit over the delisting of WBTC delisting. The post Coinbase takes aim at Justin Sun in WBTC lawsuit response appeared first on Protos.

articles.title: German banking giant develops Ethereum L2 using ZKsync
articles.description: Germany's largest bank Deutsche Bank is developing an Ethereum layer 2 network using ZKsync technology to enhance transaction efficiency and meet regulatory standards in finance, according to a new report from Bloomberg.The initiative, part of Project Dama 2 and linked to Singapore's Project Guardian, is aimed at resolving key issues for regulated lenders operating on public blockchains, such...

articles.title: Hong Kong’s HashKey Group launches Ethereum Layer 2 HashKey Chain on mainnet
articles.description: The launch follows a successful testnet period where 50 projects were deployed and more than 24.72 million transactions were completed.

articles.title: Bitcoin and Ether ETF Expected to Lead U.S. Crypto Funds in 2025
articles.description: According to ShibDaily, Bloomberg ETF analyst Eric Balchunas has forecasted that Bitcoin and Ethereum exchange-traded funds (ETFs) will be the first U.S. crypto funds to launch in 2025, with additional funds to follow. On December 17, Balchunas shared an analysis from fellow ETF analyst James Seyffart, indicating a gradual introduction of cryptocurrency ETFs next year. The initial offerings...

articles.title: Bitcoin ETFs Overtake Gold in Major Market Shift
articles.description: Bitcoin ETFs in the US have surpassed gold ETFs in assets, marking a historic shift as investors embrace Bitcoin as the new store of value.

articles.title: Crypto.com Drops SEC Lawsuit After Meeting with Trump
articles.description: Trump reportedly discussed government appointments concerning digital assets and plans for a strategic Bitcoin reserve with Crypto.com’s CEO.
